content_body:
The Swan Drive-In Theater offers a unique taste of the past with current first-run movies. You can enjoy a movie outside under the stars or in the privacy of your car. The Swan Drive-In is equipped with FM stereo sound where patrons use their car radio or even a portable radio to tune in. The Swan Drive-In operates year-round with current first-run movies and retro flashbacks. Enjoy nostalgic concessions while enjoying the latest flick.

The Swan Drive-In has been operating since 1955 and was built by Jack Jones Sr. and W. H. Tilley Jr. Mr. Tilley was stationed in England during World War II just before being sent to Omaha Beach in the Normandy invasion. While he was in England, he enjoyed watching the peaceful and beautiful swans swimming in the local ponds. He decided his drive-in would be named "Swan." Mr. Jones liked the name too because it was short and would fit well on neon signs, so the name The Swan Drive-In Theater was born.
title: Swan Drive-In Theater
